options.name: --searchPattern
options.description: (Default: *.trx) search pattern to scan for trx

options.name: --outputFileName
options.description: (Default: TestResults.html) name for the html file

options.name: --outputDirectory
options.description: (Default: .) target directory for the html file

options.name: --workingDirectory
options.description: (Default: .) directory to scan recursive for trx

options.name: --templateFile
options.description: path of template file used to create the html file

options.name: --all
options.description:
(Default: false) process all matched trx files,
otherwise only latest trx file per folder
